summary.source_trial_scope_note: Only trial paths under the latest incident root are eligible copy sources for this repair plan. Older legacy _trial references remain out of scope for 21b/21c and stay in missing_both_summary.

repo.head_commit: f7af339 add current-only closeout apply option

artist_works_images.source_rule: Use existing metadata trial local_path only when it is under the scoped incident trial root and the file exists.
artist_works_images.destination_rule: Preserve the verified source basename and place it under data/current/images/cache/artist_works_images/2025/{fair_slug}/

exhibition_works_images.source_rule: Use existing metadata trial local_path only when it is under the scoped incident trial root and the file exists.
exhibition_works_images.destination_rule: Preserve the verified source basename and place it under data/current/images/cache/exhibition_works_images/2025/{fair_slug}/
exhibition_works_images.exhibition_title_inference_note: exhibition_title is best-effort derived from source_url/seed_source_url because the current metadata schema does not store an explicit exhibition_title field.

no planned destination collisions or duplicate destination rows were found
protected paths remained unchanged during verify-first planning
no p3n10r2 post-check log was detected

missing_both_summary.scope_note: These counts remain out of scope for 21b/21c. They are not copied in this task and should be evaluated later for URL re-download eligibility.

apply_scope: Copy only the listed rows from source_trial_path to destination_current_path.
Create destination directories only if the listed current cache directory is missing at apply time.
Do not run R2 apply or post-check as part of 21c.
Do not update docs 01/02/03/04 as part of 21c.
preflight_checks: Re-verify exists_in_trial == true for all rows before copying.
Re-verify exists_in_current == false before copying each row.
Abort if any destination has become occupied by different content.
